--dDRMvlgZJXvWKvBx
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=iso-8859-1
 Content-Disposition: inline
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 This port has nothing to do with x11. Please replace `x11` with `net` or
 just removes it from the CATEGORIES list. And also removes `x11` from
 fcitx-sunpinyin, fcitx-googlepinyin's CATEGORIES list when you commit
 this. They are pure IM modules, and do not depends on X.
 
 --=20
 Zhihao Yuan, nickname lichray
 The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
 ___________________________________________________
 4BSD -- http://4bsd.biz/
